response: The Charkhi Dadri mid-air collision occurred on 12 November 1996, while the Tenerife airport disaster occurred on March 27, 1977. The Tenerife airport disaster was the deadliest aviation accident in history, resulting in 583 fatalities, whereas the Charkhi Dadri mid-air collision resulted in 349 fatalities. Therefore, the Tenerife airport disaster occurred first.
